name: Dropbox
description: Browse, search, upload and share Dropbox files via the remote MCP server (OAuth 2.1).
note: Sign in with your Dropbox account in the browser — no app keys to paste. The server uses OAuth 2.1 with Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591). Your access token is encrypted and refreshed automatically. Provides 20 tools: file browsing, search, upload, download, copy, move, delete, shared links, file requests, revision history, and more.

setupSteps.text: Click Sign in — your browser opens the Dropbox consent screen.
Approve the request. The token is stored encrypted — you won't need to sign in again unless you disconnect.
